benefits.name: Complete Property Tax Exemption (100% Disabled)
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% VA disability rating receive complete exemption from property taxes on their homestead and up to 1 acre of land.
benefits.notes: Exemption applies to homestead principal residence and up to 1 acre of land adjacent to dwelling.

benefits.name: Partial Property Tax Exemption (10–90% Disabled)
benefits.description: Veterans with service-connected disability ratings of 10% to 90% receive a partial exemption based on their disability percentage.
benefits.notes: Exemption amount correlates with disability percentage: 10% = smallest exemption, 90% = largest partial exemption.

benefits.name: Property Tax Exemption (Surviving Spouse)
benefits.description: Surviving spouse of a 100% P&T disabled veteran retains the full property tax exemption on the homestead.
benefits.notes: Exemption continues for surviving spouse after veteran's death.

benefits.name: Hazelwood Act (Free Tuition)
benefits.description: Texas veterans with Honorable discharge receive tuition assistance (150 credit hours) at Texas public colleges and universities, transferable to eligible dependents.
benefits.notes: Legacy Act allows transfer to spouse and children if veteran did not use full benefit. Covers tuition and mandatory fees only.

benefits.name: Disabled Veteran License Plates
benefits.description: Veterans with 50% or higher service-connected disability rating receive free specialty license plates.
benefits.notes: Distinctive purple and gold plates may provide parking benefits and identification.

benefits.name: Vehicle Sales Tax Exemption (50%+ Disabled)
benefits.description: Veterans with 50% or higher disability rating are exempt from sales tax on one vehicle purchase.
benefits.notes: One-time exemption per veteran. Vehicle must be titled in Texas.

benefits.name: Free Hunting and Fishing License
benefits.description: Veterans with 50% or higher service-connected disability rating receive a free lifetime hunting and fishing combo license.
benefits.notes: Lifetime license; issued by Texas Parks and Wildlife Department.

benefits.name: Texas Veterans Land Board Loans
benefits.description: Below-market loans for purchasing land or improving homes. Available to Texas veterans with Honorable or General discharge.
benefits.notes: Loans up to $100,000 for land; competitive rates and flexible terms.

benefits.name: State Employment Preference
benefits.description: Disabled veterans receive preference points in Texas state civil service hiring.
benefits.estimatedValue: 5–10 bonus points on state job exams
benefits.notes: Preference applies to competitive examinations for state positions.
